args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 10;

val_args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 10;
